hero.heading: The neighborhood barbershop, open every day.
hero.subheading: A family-run barbershop one block off Glendale Boulevard. Cuts, beards, line-ups, and the kind of conversation regulars come back for. Open eight to seven, seven days a week.

about.label: The shop
about.heading: Two chairs. Two barbers. Twenty years.
paragraphs: VJ Barbershop has been on Kenilworth Avenue since 2005. Two chairs, two barbers, twenty years of regulars walking through the same door.
We do classic cuts, scissor-over-comb, skin fades, beard work, and full programs. No appointments required — call ahead if you want to skip the wait or just walk in and pull up a chair.
Open eight to seven every day of the week. Cash or card, same price. The neighbors bring their kids, and now their kids bring their kids.

services.title: Men's Cut
services.description: Scissor, clipper, or both. Your length, your finish. Hot-towel neck shave included. Thirty minutes.

services.title: Skin Fade
services.description: Bald fade blended through the top with a straight-razor edge-up. Thirty-five minutes.

services.title: Cut + Beard
services.description: Full classic cut plus straight-razor beard work and hot-towel finish. Forty-five minutes.

services.title: Kids' Cut · 12 & Under
services.description: Same care, smaller chair, ten dollars off. Pop in any time during shop hours.

services.title: Senior Rate · 65 +
services.description: Standing senior rate any chair, any day. ID gets the price, no fuss.

services.title: Buzz & Line-up
services.description: All-over single-guard buzz with a straight-razor edge-up. In and out in fifteen.

reviews.name: Aram K.
reviews.text: Same barber, same chair, every other Saturday for fifteen years. VJ is the kind of shop that doesn't exist much anymore — open early, open late, real prices, real work.

reviews.name: Henrik G.
reviews.text: Walked in cold on a Tuesday afternoon and was out the door in twenty-five minutes with the cleanest fade I've had in Glendale. Now it's the only place I go.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Bringing my two boys here was the cleanest fifteen minutes of my week. They handed each a candy bar, made them laugh, and gave them real cuts. Family shop.

contact.mapEmbedQuery: VJ Barbershop, 1015 N Kenilworth Ave, Glendale, CA 91202

seo.title: VJ Barbershop — Family-run barber on Kenilworth, Glendale
seo.description: Two-chair family barbershop on Kenilworth Ave in Glendale. Cuts, fades, beard work, kids and senior rates. Open eight to seven, seven days.
